summary: Iteration 2 — Tested 3 NEW features (company packs, voice STT, resume diff) + regression of existing flows. Backend: 10/10 pytest passed in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py (~37s) covering company-tailored question generation (Google signals present), company persistence on session doc, /api/voice/transcribe auth+missing file+valid WAV (Whisper returned 200 with text key), and /api/resume/diff auth+missing ids+unowned (404)+valid (all keys present). Frontend: company grid (7 buttons) renders, Summary shows selected company, sidebar 'Resume History' link works, Resume Analyzer 'View history' link works, /resume/history lists past resumes with diff pickers and run-diff produces colored word-diff. Active question header shows ' · GOOGLE'. Mic button (voice-record-button) present and visible. InterviewResult page shows 'Listen' button (tts-0). No regressions observed in login/dashboard/resume analyzer flows.
critical_code_review_comments: voice_routes.py silently coerces unknown extensions to 'webm' (line 28) instead of returning 415. Acceptable but logs nothing; consider warning log for unexpected file types.
resume_diff_routes.py uses 'from server import db' inside endpoint (same pattern flagged in iteration_1). Prefer request.app.state.db DI.
voice_routes.py loads EMERGENT_LLM_KEY at import time; ensures fail-fast which is fine. Whisper transcription returns 502 on any internal exception — good UX wrapping.
resume diff: similarity ratio could be expensive for very large resumes (SequenceMatcher with autojunk=False is O(n*m)); add a max token cap (e.g., 5000 tokens) to prevent abuse.

interview_routes.evaluate persists `company` on the session doc but `GET /api/interview/{id}` returns it unfiltered — good. However, /api/interview/list returns full evaluations list which can be large; consider projection for the list view.
MockInterview.jsx: 'mt-auto pt-4 mt-6' has duplicate `mt-` Tailwind classes on Start button line (cosmetic — last wins, no functional impact).
seed_data_creation: Two extra resumes were seeded only when user had <2 resumes (via /api/resume/analyze) inside the diff fixture. Created one Google-tailored interview session for the test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite for new features at /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py runs ~37s and is idempotent (uses module-scoped fixtures and re-provisions resumes only if needed). LLM-backed tests use timeout=180s. For Whisper STT, a generated 1-sec silent WAV via stdlib `wave` is accepted by /api/voice/transcribe — Whisper returns 200 with possibly empty text. Frontend /resume/history page requires 2+ resumes for the diff section to appear; test user already has multiple resumes from iteration_1+2. Mic permissions: browser_automation grants by default; the data-testid='voice-record-button' is enough to verify presence without exercising real audio capture.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration. All 3 new features are functioning as specified end-to-end (backend → frontend rendering).
